name: std-dashboard
description: std-dashboard — molecule composing std-stats + std-graphs + std-browse (stat cards top, charts middle, data list bottom). Browse is the data hub; Stats and Graphs listen for `BrowseItemLoaded -> ITEMS_LOADED`.

schema.name: std-dashboard
schema.description: std-dashboard — molecule composing std-stats + std-graphs + std-browse (stat cards top, charts middle, data list bottom). Browse is the data hub; Stats and Graphs listen for `BrowseItemLoaded -> ITEMS_LOADED`.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the item.

fields.name: category
fields.description: The type or classification of the dashboard item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the item.

fields.name: units
fields.description: Represents a numerical measurement or quantity.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: cards
fields.description: A collection of statistical cards to display.

fields.name: chartData
fields.description: The data points used to render the chart.

events.name: Items Loaded
events.description: Data has been loaded and is ready for processing.

statLook.label: Stat display look
statLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for stat / KPI cards.

title.label: Section title
title.description: Heading shown above the stat-card grid
title.synonyms: the section header text. user phrases: 'rename section to X' / 'title the KPIs X' / 'change section title to X' -> X

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to arrange the stat cards
viewPattern.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after metrics aggregate. Default is the canonical data-grid call mapping @entity.cards through stat-display. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (hero numbers, sparkline rows, tile splashes) to deliver entirely different KPI UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, aggregation pipeline, and listens.

metrics.label: Metrics
metrics.description: One stat card per entry; declares aggregation, format, and styling
metrics.synonyms: list of KPI cards / stat tiles / metric cards. each entry has label / value / format / icon / variant / aggregation. user phrases: 'replace metrics with X, Y, Z' -> rewrite array; 'add Revenue tile' -> append entry; 'change KPIs to X' -> rewrite array

fields.name: cards
fields.description: A collection of statistical cards to display.

events.name: Items Loaded
events.description: Data has been retrieved and processed for display.

timeAxis.label: Time axis
timeAxis.description: Group by timeField bucketed by period instead of categoryField
timeAxis.synonyms: true means group by date / month / time. user phrases: 'group by month / week / year / date' -> set timeAxis=true; 'group by status / category' -> timeAxis=false

drillEvent.label: Drill event
drillEvent.description: Event emitted when a user clicks a chart point
drillEvent.synonyms: click-through navigation event. user phrases: 'on click navigate to X' / 'drill into X' / 'when clicked open X' -> X event name

period.label: Group by month / quarter / week / day / year
period.description: Group by month, quarter, week, day, or year — the calendar bucket the chart groups data into. Set ALONGSIDE timeAxis=true whenever the user says 'group by <time-unit>' or 'by <time-unit>' or 'rebucket to <time-unit>' or 'instead of <other-time-unit>'.
period.synonyms: regroup / rebucket / change bucket / group differently. user phrases: 'group by month' / 'by month' / 'monthly' / 'monthly buckets' / 'switch to monthly' / 'instead of quarter' -> month; 'group by quarter' / 'by quarter' / 'quarterly' -> quarter; 'group by week' / 'by week' / 'weekly' / 'weekly buckets' -> week; 'group by day' / 'by day' / 'daily' / 'daily buckets' -> day; 'group by year' / 'by year' / 'yearly' / 'annually' -> year. Whenever the user voices 'group by <time-unit>' BOTH period AND timeAxis=true should be set.

showLegend.label: Show legend
showLegend.synonyms: true shows the color key. user phrases: 'show legend' / 'show the legend' / 'show key' / 'with legend' / 'with a legend' -> true; 'hide legend' / 'no legend' / 'without legend' / 'remove legend' -> false

sortField.label: Sort by
sortField.description: Order points by value, label, or leave unsorted
sortField.synonyms: user phrases: 'sort by value' / 'order by amount' -> value; 'sort alphabetically' / 'sort by name' -> label; 'no sort' / 'leave order' -> none

limit.label: Top N
limit.description: Keep only the first N points after sorting (0 = all)

valueField.label: Value field
valueField.description: Numeric field aggregated per bucket (blank = row count)
valueField.synonyms: the numeric column to aggregate. empty string counts rows. user phrases: 'sum revenue' -> valueField=revenue + aggregation=sum

title.label: Title
title.synonyms: the chart's header text. user phrases: 'rename to X' / 'title it X' / 'change the title to X' / 'call it X' -> X

chartType.label: Chart type
chartType.description: Visual format for the rendered chart
chartType.synonyms: bar = vertical bars, line = connected line, pie = pie chart, donut = pie with hole, area = filled area chart, histogram = frequency distribution, scatter = XY scatter. user phrases: 'switch to donut' / 'make it a donut' / 'as a donut chart' -> donut; 'use a pie chart' -> pie; 'show as line' / 'line chart' -> line; 'as bars' / 'bar chart' -> bar

series.label: Series
series.description: Pre-formatted multi-series spec for stacked or layered charts
series.synonyms: multiple lines / bars per category. user phrases: 'compare X and Y' -> add two series entries

showValues.label: Show values
showValues.description: Render the numeric value on top of each data point
showValues.synonyms: user phrases: 'show values' / 'show numbers on bars' / 'with data labels' / 'label the bars' -> true; 'hide values' / 'no labels' -> false

categoryField.label: Group / categorize / bucket / split by field
categoryField.description: Entity field whose values become the chart's category buckets. Set this when the user voices 'group by X' / 'categorize by X' / 'bucket by X' / 'split by X' / 'break down by X' for any non-time field X (for time-units, set period + timeAxis=true instead).
categoryField.synonyms: regroup / rebucket / categorize / breakdown by / split by / segment by. user phrases: 'group by status' -> categoryField=status; 'group by region' / 'by region' -> categoryField=region; 'group by category' / 'by category' -> categoryField=category; 'group by product' / 'by product' -> categoryField=product; 'group by month' / 'by month' -> categoryField=month (when explicitly requested as a category, not a time bucket); 'split by X' / 'break down by X' / 'segment by X' / 'bucket by X' -> categoryField=X

stack.label: Stacking
stack.description: Stack bars, normalize to 100%, or render side-by-side
stack.synonyms: user phrases: 'side by side' / 'grouped' -> none; 'stacked' / 'stack the bars' -> stack; 'percent stacked' / '100% stacked' / 'normalized' -> normalize

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.synonyms: secondary header below the title. user phrases: 'with subtitle X' / 'set subtitle to X' -> X

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to draw the chart
viewPattern.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly — pattern selection is upstream

aggregation.label: Aggregation
aggregation.description: How values within a bucket combine into one number
aggregation.synonyms: user phrases: 'count' / 'how many' -> count; 'total' / 'sum of' -> sum; 'average' / 'mean' -> avg; 'minimum' / 'lowest' -> min; 'maximum' / 'highest' -> max

height.label: Chart height
height.description: Pixel height of the rendered chart
height.synonyms: vertical size in pixels. user phrases: 'taller' / 'make it taller' / 'increase height' / 'bigger vertically' -> larger number (e.g. 300, 400); 'shorter' / 'smaller' -> smaller; 'set height to 300' / '300px tall' -> 300

timeField.label: Date field
timeField.description: Entity field used as the time axis when timeAxis is on
timeField.synonyms: the date / timestamp / created-at column. set when timeAxis=true

sortDir.label: Sort direction
sortDir.description: Ascending or descending order for the sort field
sortDir.synonyms: asc = ascending = lowest-to-highest = low-to-high = smallest-first. desc = descending = highest-to-lowest = high-to-low = largest-first. user phrases: 'highest to lowest' / 'largest first' / 'descending' -> desc; 'lowest to highest' / 'smallest first' / 'ascending' -> asc

fields.name: chartData
fields.description: The data points used to render the chart.

events.name: Items Loaded
events.description: Data has been retrieved and processed for display.

stack.synonyms: user phrases: 'side by side' / 'grouped' -> none; 'stacked' / 'stack the bars' -> stack; 'percent stacked' / '100% stacked' / 'normalized' -> normalize

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.synonyms: secondary header below the title. user phrases: 'with subtitle X' / 'set subtitle to X' -> X

viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to draw the chart
viewPattern.synonyms: internal pattern selector. user prompts rarely target this directly — pattern selection is upstream

aggregation.description: How values within a bucket combine into one number
aggregation.synonyms: user phrases: 'count' / 'how many' -> count; 'total' / 'sum of' -> sum; 'average' / 'mean' -> avg; 'minimum' / 'lowest' -> min; 'maximum' / 'highest' -> max

sortDir.synonyms: asc = ascending = lowest-to-highest = low-to-high = smallest-first. desc = descending = highest-to-lowest = high-to-low = largest-first. user phrases: 'highest to lowest' / 'largest first' / 'descending' -> desc; 'lowest to highest' / 'smallest first' / 'ascending' -> asc

fields.name: chartData
fields.description: The data points used to render the chart.

emits.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.
Indicates a failure to load a browse item.
Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.
Signals a request to edit the selected item.
Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

events.name: BrowseItem loaded
events.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.

events.name: BrowseItem load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a browse item.

events.name: Refetch Query
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on the current query.

events.name: Refetch Filter
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on current filter criteria.

events.name: Refetch Page
events.description: Triggers a data grid page refresh.

events.name: View
events.description: Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.

events.name: Edit
events.description: Signals a request to edit the selected item.

events.name: Delete
events.description: Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

titleBinding.label: Title field binding
titleBinding.description: Binding path for the card title slot (e.g. @item.dishName).

searchPlaceholder.label: Search box placeholder text
searchPlaceholder.description: Hint text inside the list search box (e.g. 'Search orders…').
searchPlaceholder.synonyms: search hint, placeholder, search box text, search label

cols.label: How many columns in the grid?
cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive card/grid layout.
cols.synonyms: columns, grid width, card columns, num columns

priorityBinding.label: Priority field binding
priorityBinding.description: Binding path for the priority slot.

itemActions.label: What actions can users take on each row?
itemActions.description: Buttons rendered on each row (e.g. Edit, Delete, View).
itemActions.synonyms: row buttons, row actions, item actions, per-row buttons, table actions

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

assigneeBinding.label: Assignee field binding
assigneeBinding.description: Binding path for the assignee/owner slot.

descriptionBinding.label: Description field binding
descriptionBinding.description: Binding path for the card body/subtitle slot.

displayPageSize.label: How many rows to show at once?
displayPageSize.description: Rows visible per page before the pagination control appears.
displayPageSize.synonyms: visible rows, items per page, display limit, show per page

maxInlineActions.label: How many row actions to show before collapsing?
maxInlineActions.description: Actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Set 2–3 for dense tables.
maxInlineActions.synonyms: inline actions limit, overflow threshold, max buttons per row

categoryBinding.label: Category field binding
categoryBinding.description: Binding path for the category/tag slot.

metaBinding.label: Meta field binding
metaBinding.description: Binding path for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

fields.label: Which fields should appear as columns?
fields.description: Each entry maps one entity field to a display column with an optional label and variant.
fields.synonyms: visible columns, displayed fields, card fields, column list

imageLabelBinding.label: Image label binding
imageLabelBinding.description: Binding path for the image-area label slot.

pageSize.label: How many rows to fetch per page?
pageSize.description: Records fetched from the server per page request.
pageSize.synonyms: fetch limit, records per page, batch size, page limit

badgeBinding.label: Badge field binding
badgeBinding.description: Binding path for the status/badge slot.

filters.label: Which filters should appear above the list?
filters.description: Dropdown filter facets by field. Each fires a refetch when the user changes the selection. Empty = no filter bar.
filters.synonyms: filter bar, faceted filters, field filters, column filters, dropdowns

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

gap.label: Spacing between rows
gap.description: Gap between grid cells: sm, md, or lg.
gap.synonyms: row gap, cell spacing, grid gap, padding between items

priceBinding.label: Price field binding
priceBinding.description: Binding path for the price/amount overlay slot.

columns.label: Table columns
columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

imageField.label: Which field holds the row image?
imageField.description: Entity field containing the thumbnail URL for each row.
imageField.synonyms: image field, thumbnail field, photo field, picture column

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the item.

emits.description: Signals a data item has been successfully loaded.
Indicates a failure to load a dashboard item.

events.name: DashboardItem loaded
events.description: Signals a data item has been successfully loaded.

events.name: DashboardItem load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a dashboard item.
